description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in dark leather or leather-like material. The sofa features three seat cushions and three backrest cushions, all of which are attached and uniform in size, providing a streamlined appearance. The left side of the sofa extends into a chaise lounge, offering additional seating or a place to recline. Both armrests are straight, padded, and positioned at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. The legs are metallic, with a sled-style design at the corners and a central support under the chaise, giving the sofa a slightly elevated and contemporary look. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with subtle seam lines visible along the back and seat.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional sofa with dark, smooth leather upholstery, straight padded armrests, and metallic sled-style legs. Features a chaise lounge extension and uniform attached cushions.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shaped layout, chaise lounge on the left, three seat and back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise end, highlighting the sofa's depth, the single armrest, and the metallic sled leg beneath the chaise.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest, seam lines, and the alignment of the metallic legs.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, showing the full length of the chaise, the right armrest, and the sofa's overall height.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, arranged in a continuous L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Five metallic sled-style legs: one at each corner and a central support under the chaise, all exposed with a sleek, modern finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest segmented into three attached cushions, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth leather or leather-like upholstery with subtle seam lines and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
